title: Bien Hoa、Dong Nai — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Bien Hoa、Dong Nai的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Bien Hoa是Dong Nai的一個城市，人口約1,100,000。An industrial hub adjacent to Ho Chi Minh City, offering significantly lower housing costs while providing access to the economic opportunities of the greater metro area.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
